Sun.description: Represents identity, ego, self-expression and vitality.

Moon.description: Represents emotions, inner world, intuition and nurturing energy.

Mars.description: Represents ambition, drive, assertiveness and conflict.

Venus.description: Represents love, harmony, relationships and art.

Mercury.description: Represents communication, logic, travel and intelligence.

Jupiter.description: Represents wisdom, growth, fortune and knowledge.

Saturn.description: Represents discipline, responsibility, boundaries and lessons.

Rahu.description: Represents ambition, illusion, foreign influences and sudden events.

Ketu.description: Represents detachment, spirituality, past-life karma and liberation.
